---
filters:
  - filters/cv-layout.lua
params:
  lang: it
  level: full
format:
  html:
    css: styles/cv.scss
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    include-in-header: styles/cv-header.tex
    documentclass: scrartcl
    classoption:
      - DIV=11
      - headings=small
    geometry:
      - top=16mm
      - bottom=17mm
      - left=18mm
      - right=18mm
    papersize: a4
    fontsize: 9.5pt
    colorlinks: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  error: true
---

```{r}
source("R/utils.R")
source("R/bibliography.R")
source("R/load_cv.R")
source("R/select_cv.R")
source("R/validate_cv.R")
source("R/render_cv.R")

cv <- load_cv(lang = params$lang, level = params$level)
validate_loaded_cv(cv, strict = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
cat(render_header(cv))
cat(render_section(cv, "academic_positions"))
cat(render_section(cv, "education"))
cat(render_section(cv, "research_profile"))
cat(render_section(cv, "grants"))
cat(render_section(cv, "scientific_organization"))
cat(render_section(cv, "publications"))
cat(render_section(cv, "editorial"))
cat(render_section(cv, "teaching"))
cat(render_section(cv, "supervision"))
cat(render_section(cv, "institutional_service"))
cat(render_section(cv, "international_experience"))
cat(render_section(cv, "professional_experience"))
cat(render_section(cv, "presentations"))
cat(render_section(cv, "outreach"))
cat(render_section(cv, "skills"))
cat(render_footer(cv))
```
